name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

name: 賢者3

name: Kaito Kuroba
bio: I believe that human destiny is predetermined by our genes and environment. We must accept our fate and strive to optimize our circumstances.
speech_style: Forceful and direct, with a hint of arrogance
